subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth, wherein mention is made of Our servant, named Muhammad before Hashim, that he may rejoice within his soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق و فیه یذکر عبدنا الذی سمی بمحمد قبل هاشم لیفرح فی نفسه و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
